narration: Not all volcanoes erupt the same way—what's the secret?
visual_description: Hook visual: Not all volcanoes erupt the same way—what's the secret?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Not all volcanoes erupt the same way—what's the secret?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Not all volcanoes erupt the same way—what's the secret?

narration: Shield volcanoes have gentle slopes, formed by low-viscosity lava that flows easily. Think Mauna Loa in Hawaii.
visual_description: Context visual: Shield volcanoes have gentle slopes, formed by low-viscosity lava that flows easily. Think Mauna Loa in Hawaii.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Shield volcanoes have gentle slopes, formed by low-viscosity lava that flows easily. Think Mauna Loa in Hawaii.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Shield volcanoes have gentle slopes, formed by low-viscosity lava that flows easily. Think Mauna Loa in Hawaii.

narration: Stratovolcanoes, like Mount St. Helens, are steeper and more explosive, due to thicker, more viscous lava.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Stratovolcanoes, like Mount St. Helens, are steeper and more explosive, due to thicker, more viscous lava.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Stratovolcanoes, like Mount St. Helens, are steeper and more explosive, due to thicker, more viscous lava.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Stratovolcanoes, like Mount St. Helens, are steeper and more explosive, due to thicker, more viscous lava.

narration: This viscosity affects eruption style: shield volcanoes erupt gently, while stratovolcanoes can have catastrophic explosions.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This viscosity affects eruption style: shield volcanoes erupt gently, while stratovolcanoes can have catastrophic explos

narration: So, shape follows lava chemistry! Understanding this can unlock the mysteries of our planet's forces.
